{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221923108255D29706055BF8D184"}"},"total":7541},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6969034892122899235","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错女主很厉害聪明睿智心思缜密对人又狠对自己更狠，这样的人不会感情用事非常理智没有软肋很强大。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1622604884,"group_id":"6912633710823083015","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小短文文风不长自由发挥，自己喜欢爱好喜欢的可以看看，喜欢喜。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz9gamSFb4maBrDyij4evfs=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/64efbaba859746f6ab2b8c70c360a5c2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701644&x-signature=P7hrdDuk5gy8e8HUuGUeX0FUzAA%3D","user_id":"78820569003912","user_name":"紫离夏殇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"78820569003912","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6912633710823083015","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限快穿+惊悚悬疑推理+无CP，女主行事疯狂但脑子绝对正常！慢节奏！慢节奏！慢节奏！】

S级重刑犯叶黎被强行绑定惩罚改造系统后，流放到无数虚拟构建的绝境世界中服刑受惩，服刑过程越痛苦，抵扣的罪恶值越多。

在服刑过程中，叶黎发现自己似乎自带不死buff。

于是，她开始了各种上天入地花样作死。

叶黎：“死不死的无所谓，但姿势一定要帅！”

PS：偏快穿类，非快节奏无限流，节奏较慢，故事独立！
由于文最早设定并不是无CP，第一个故事有些单箭头描写，但女主无回应无暧昧，介意的宝子可以直接从第二个小故事开始看，不影响阅读。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/pgc-image/364c216781b74ea9947a44e063c241fe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"大夭","author_id":"","book_id":"6912633710823083015","book_name":"疯批人设不能崩［无限流］","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#080818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6912646327851549191","read_count":"10125","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"560211"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"258","tags":"快穿,现代言情,校园,系统,幻想言情,穿越,无CP,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/80cf52c81a2217e8b6651c090e62a88f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362590&x-signature=169%2FNaGvWShtqj0Iwv8thJXZBCs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1292675840484400","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"64"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221923108255D29706055BF8D184"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":368,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3725,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16549,"reply_count":9,"show_pv":270681},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1622613587,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6984034105734644513","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"校园那一篇真的我（粗鄙）赞爆！才刚看了一章就马上毕恭毕敬地供进书架里了！校园这篇封神好嘛！！！逻辑严谨，思维节奏完全跟得上，而且很好理解，每读一段脑海里画面拉满！草草草我控制不了自己太牛了太牛了，，但有一说一感觉特殊感染者这篇有点遗憾，感觉故事整体不错确实是不错，但比起校园就要略显逊色一点（可能主要是我口味更偏校园的恐怖一点吧，实际上我认为特殊感染者的结尾有一丢丢仓促）。然后是现在的古堡，古堡的氛围是很好的，现在丢出的管家、浓雾、花匠、敲窗声、供奉恶魔、小岛位置、失踪等设定都很吸引人，希望结局可以将这些信息都规划得有条理些，我真的非常期待作者大大接下来的文章！也一直在不停脑补后续的绝境，例如：魔法异世界、科幻未来、仙侠修真这些，我一想到就老兴奋了！作者大大加油！","text_exts":[{"e":305,"s":302,"text":"异世界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BC%82%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741785905BF8D184%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%226984034105734644513%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226912633710823083015%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BC%82%E4%B8%96%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1626097159,"group_id":"6912633710823083015","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新人作家，学生党一枚，意识流，见谅","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzUPd9ZuV8oSMx7w9ZnvFlGQYXnaduCTck+hrPtFecoD","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7208cac1a5534802ba568d44c2e333ca~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710513&x-signature=pU1RiqViSKU1MbokMCa5SMv5iEQ%3D","user_id":"2845184016526136","user_name":"作者zg8bud"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2845184016526136","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6912633710823083015","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限快穿+惊悚悬疑推理+无CP，女主行事疯狂但脑子绝对正常！慢节奏！慢节奏！慢节奏！】

S级重刑犯叶黎被强行绑定惩罚改造系统后，流放到无数虚拟构建的绝境世界中服刑受惩，服刑过程越痛苦，抵扣的罪恶值越多。

在服刑过程中，叶黎发现自己似乎自带不死buff。

于是，她开始了各种上天入地花样作死。

叶黎：“死不死的无所谓，但姿势一定要帅！”

PS：偏快穿类，非快节奏无限流，节奏较慢，故事独立！
由于文最早设定并不是无CP，第一个故事有些单箭头描写，但女主无回应无暧昧，介意的宝子可以直接从第二个小故事开始看，不影响阅读。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/pgc-image/364c216781b74ea9947a44e063c241fe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"大夭","author_id":"","book_id":"6912633710823083015","book_name":"疯批人设不能崩［无限流］","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#080818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":24,"name":"快穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=24&name=快穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6912646327851549191","read_count":"10125","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"560211"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"258","tags":"快穿,现代言情,校园,系统,幻想言情,穿越,无CP,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/80cf52c81a2217e8b6651c090e62a88f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362590&x-signature=169%2FNaGvWShtqj0Iwv8thJXZBCs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1292675840484400","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"99"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221923108255D29706055BF8D184"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":178,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":471,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18953,"reply_count":12,"show_pv":120840},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1626126193,"author_reply_time":1626126673,"is_author_stick":false,"privacy_type":2,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6992853184385418020","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的太好看了，看完第一个绝境的赶紧滚来写长评。
第一个绝境主要是讲校园欺凌的事情，祁叶舟和温雪这一对学霸的爱恋我很喜欢，祁叶舟爱到深处，疯狂帮着温雪复仇，想要报复一切伤害他们的人。
温雪真的特别让人心疼，温雪自始至终都没有怨恨，只有对这世道、对人性的不解。她特别的温柔，而且很善解人意。
“我们从小一起长大，贫苦的家境、相似的境遇让我们惺惺相惜，一路相互扶持、相互鼓励、彼此照顾着，不论生活有多艰难苦涩，不论我有多沮丧悲观，可她总是笑以面对，积极又乐观，她对我来说就是绝境中的一束光！”
从这一段话里可以看得出来，温雪就是照进祁叶舟黑暗世界的一道光。可是这道光被她们无休止的欺凌，最后温雪承受不了选择跳楼。导致祁叶舟没能挽回她的遗憾。这对情侣真的好遗憾。
本书女主叶黎不喜欢跟别人发生肢体接触，哪怕乐隽在害怕也不会选择靠近她。还有乐隽真的特别温柔阳光，而且超级无敌的体贴，个高胆小的反差真的太戳我心了！！我真的疯狂磕这一对cp，爱死了，就是不知道男主会不会是乐隽。
但是大大说是独立的世界，那貌似不太可能了，等我看到后面再来唠唠！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1628150511,"group_id":"6912633710823083015","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"热爱自由，一如我笔下的晚风。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0G1MnEjlkKMlDPCrNpdEWIHf+2e1rBomn9112mBcq4y","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/01b1b6ba90374d98b3ef169953646d49~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709896&x-signature=1SESdLi8EPyipmcic3VKlQiVUVU%3D","user_id":"1398210753733165","user_name":"苏以眠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1398210753733165","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1710194121,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6912633710823083015","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限快穿+惊悚悬疑推理+无CP，女主行事疯狂但脑子绝对正常！慢节奏！慢节奏！慢节奏！】
